name: litellm
description: LiteLLM MCP - access multiple LLM providers with automatic fallback. Provides completion tools that route through LiteLLM proxy for OpenAI, GWDG SAIA, Anthropic, and other providers.
notes: Requires LiteLLM proxy to be running (enabled via litellm.enabled in host config). Configure providers and models in ~/.config/agentbox/config.yml
